description: Address critical security issues found in code review: stored XSS, IDOR, missing ownership checks, raw JSON injection, and hardcoded session secret warnings.
steps: Fix stored XSS in passive-saas/qr-code-generator/routes/track.js by HTML-escaping content before rendering
Fix IDOR in active-saas/invoice-billing/routes/invoices.js by verifying invoice ownership before deleting line items
Fix missing ownership checks in passive-saas/status-page/routes/incidents.js for update and resolve handlers
Fix raw JSON injection in active-saas/chatbot-builder/views/builder.ejs by safely serializing flows
Add warning log to all 8 server.js files when falling back to default session secret
acceptance_criteria: QR track route HTML-escapes content to prevent XSS
Invoice delete verifies ownership before deleting line items
Incident update and resolve check that incident belongs to user
Chatbot builder safely serializes JSON without script context escape
All 8 apps log a warning when using fallback session secret
